final:
module top_module(
  input wire [4:0] entrada1,
  input wire [4:0] entrada2,
  input wire seletor,
  output reg [4:0] saida
);always @(*) saida <= (seletor) ? entrada1 : entrada2;
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      if (seletor == 1'b0) begin
        saida <= ~entrada1;
      end else if (seletor == 1'b1) begin
        saida <= ~entrada2;
      end
    end
  end

endmodule
